Security Link From Ameitech'S Motion For Summary Judmgnet
Off Calendar Apr-24-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Julie Clerk Martin, Esq. of LA FOLLETTE, JOHNSON 916/563-3100 for x-deft MAJOR LINES OF CALIFORNIA moving party
Daniel M. Crawford, Esq. 433-1442 and Peter Bumerts, Esq. of the LAW OFFICES OF EDWIN TRAIN CALDWELL 421-5310 for Plaintiffs MELANIE SEGUINE and ROBERT AMUNDSON opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Security Link from Ameritech's Motion for Summary Judgment against plaintiff: DENIED. Triable issue of fact exists regarding causation.
Security Link from Ameritech's Motion for Summary Adjudication against Major Lines regarding express contractual indemnity: GRANTED. Agreement at paragraph six (6) expressly indemnifies Security Link from losses arising out of its own negligence whether active or passive. (JJM/MD) Eric Throne, CSR 7855

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-24-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Julie Clerk Martin, Esq. of LA FOLLETTE, JOHNSON 916/563-3100 for x-deft MAJOR LINES OF CALIFORNIA moving for summary judgment
Daniel M. Crawford, Esq. 433-1442 and Peter Bumerts, Esq. of the LAW OFFICES OF EDWIN TRAIN CALDWELL 421-5310 for Plaintiffs MELANIE SEGUINE and ROBERT AMUNDSON opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Cross-Defendant Major Lines of California's Motion Summary Judgment: DENIED.
Motion for Summary adjudication: as to the declaratory relief for Express Indemnity DENIED. Agreement between the parties at paragraph six (6) explicitly indemnifies Security Link from its own negligence whether active or passive
Motion for Summary Adjudication as to Equitable Indemnity GRANTED. Express indemnity provision is controlling. Equitable indemnity is not applicable due to existence of express indemnity provision. See Rossmoor Sanitation, Inc v Pylon 13 Cal 3d 622. (JJM/MD) Eric Throne, CSR 7855
